title: Cyphorima angustifolia
taxonomy: Cyphorima angustifolia is classified in the family Nyctaginaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the four o'clock family. This family is part of the order Caryophyllales, which includes various succulent and flowering plant species. The Nyctaginaceae family is native to the Americas and consists of about 28 genera. Cyphorima angustifolia is a species within this family and is known for its distinctive characteristics. Further classification of Cyphorima angustifolia may involve its genus and species levels, but its family and order are well-established.

intro: Cyphorophora angustifolia, also known as Cyphorima angustifolia, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help in reducing the risk of chronic diseases like cancer and cardiovascular disease. The bioactive constituents of Cyphorima angustifolia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and glucosinolates, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
